parameters.name: ARM Analog input 4 - Backup Battery voltage
Calc_Total Fuel Used From Sys Fuel Rate
Scheme Output 533 1h of rest after ignition off
Scheme Output 534 - Air pressure less than 7 bar
Scheme Output 663 - internal for start driving
Scheme Output 1786 for idle without pto (201)
Scheme Output 13645 Cruise distance from total distance
Scheme Output 19370 - Above the green band
